summary: Phase 2 PLAN for Pita Kabab (single-location Palestinian Mediterranean restaurant, 3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404). Restaurant Page-Family Matrix v1: 46 planned internal pages (41 unconditional + 5 owner-gated conditional) across core (3), menu-category (7), occasion (10), search-intent (10), story/info/GEO (8), and neighborhood (8) families, each mapped to an engine restaurant-archetype route kind (home, menu hub, menu/[slug], occasions/[slug], root [slug], neighborhoods/[slug], contact) so route count is a direct function of data entries (menu.json 7 + occasions.json 10 + landings.json 18 + neighborhoods.json 8 + 3 fixed routes). 13 thin/contested candidates FOLDED with named reasons rather than shipped thin. External links (DoorDash, tel, sms, maps, Facebook) are CTAs, never pages. Every planned page is grounded in the sealed Phase 1 intent families / 5 pillar clusters / competitor gaps and Phase 0 facts; halal-dependent pages are conditional on owner confirmation of the certifying body, near-me pages are sized conservatively (local-pack never observed), and no page brief fabricates claims. Supporting detail in page-matrix-plan.md.
ownerChecklistReference: Yahya/founder gate: this matrix requires Yahya approval plus the page-matrix-depth review after sealing (capsule gatesAfterCompletion). Owner checklist: D:\website\pita-kabab\_bmad-output\local-site-pipeline\workbench\pita-kabab-2026-07-12-b5881b47\phase-0\owner-questionnaire.md (17 items) gates: halal certifying body (5 conditional pages), exactly-3 value props + CTA banner copy (home CRO gate), external lead-form endpoint (lead form on home/contact), SMS capability (sms: half of dual CTA), canonical phone confirmation (call CTA on every page), catering terms confirmation (catering occasion briefs), offer declaration (offer callout), trust-fact confirmations (>=6 or grid omitted), ordering strategy (/how-to-order), domain replace-vs-coexist (legacy-URL redirects for /catering/, /family-dinner/, /order/).

pageMatrixStrategy.model: Restaurant Page-Family Matrix v1 - restaurant-native depth model (occasion / menu-category / search-intent / neighborhood / story families plus fixed core), replacing service x location SAP for this single-location restaurant
pageFamilies: story (root [slug] landings, kinds story/info/faq incl. GEO/AI-answer targets)
neighborhood (neighborhoods/[slug] local landings under the anti-doorway schema floor)
pageMatrixStrategy.seamNote: The specialist SKILL.md's When-NOT-to-use skips single-location businesses; the runner rules for this engagement mandate restaurant page families for this single-location restaurant (the skill's own restaurant/single-location mode carve-out). Runner rules win where they conflict; documented per dispatch. Slug convention follows the engine's fixed restaurant route kinds - no /{location}/{service} SAP pattern applies.

routeKindMapping.root-landing: pages/[slug].astro from landings.json entries (18 pages; reserved slugs menu/contact/occasions/neighborhoods avoided)

externalCtasNeverPages: sms: text link (owner-gated; no SMS capability evidenced)
pageMatrixStrategy.crossLinkingPlan: Home links each family hub and top quick-win landings; menu hub links all 7 categories; each menu category cross-links its dish landings and >=1 occasion; each occasion links >=4 targets (menu categories, catering siblings, contact); dish landings link their menu category + related dishes + relevant occasion; neighborhoods link menu, catering occasion, and contact (occasion schema minima: >=4 crossLinks; landings/neighborhoods carry crossLinks arrays).

minimumPageCountRationale: 46 internal pages planned: 3 core + 7 menu-category + 10 occasion + 10 search-intent + 8 story/info + 8 neighborhood. This sits inside the runner's mandatory 25-500 internal-page gate and matches the sealed Phase 1 core sizing guidance (~45-55 pages: 8 service + 10 dish + 14 geo + 8 occasion + 10-15 GEO/FAQ, adapted to restaurant families). 5 pages are conditional on owner confirmations (4 halal-gated: /occasions/iftar-catering, /occasions/halal-catering, /halal-restaurant-cedar-rapids, /halal-heritage-of-cedar-rapids; 1 craft-claim-gated: /how-we-cook-charcoal-shawarma); the floor holds at 41 pages even if every conditional page drops, so the 25-page minimum is never at risk from owner gating. Route count is a direct function of engine data entries: menu.json (7) + occasions.json (10) + landings.json (18) + neighborhoods.json (8) + 3 fixed routes (home, menu hub, contact) = 46 emitted routes, keeping the Phase 4 route-completeness comparison exact. The matrix was NOT inflated toward the ceiling: 13 candidates that could not clear the anti-thin standard (entrenched-competitor battle pages, near-duplicate dish siblings, contested or fact-less towns, unresolved geography) were folded with named reasons instead of shipping thin - fold-or-don't-ship per the specialist skill, and neighborhood folds mirror the engine schema minima so plan-time and build-time folds agree. Near-me/neighborhood pages are deliberately conservative at 8 (not the full 14-anchor ring) because local-pack rankings were never observed (Phase 1 evidence gap); external ordering/social/map links are CTAs and were never counted as pages.
